text: Except as otherwise expressly provided herein, all of the provisions of this chapter shall apply to a limited use vehicle in the same manner as if such vehicle was not a limited use vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2260 — General provisions

Except as otherwise expressly provided herein, all of the provisions of this chapter shall apply to a limited use vehicle in the same manner as if such vehicle was not a limited use vehicle.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
